title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 08 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 08 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 08 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/11/2021
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate in a day, the main contract closed 570.5, an increase of 1.42% throughout the day. The quotation in themorning fluctuate steadily; Market wait-and-see sentiment increased, most traders negotiation pattern is more flexible. Some steel mills purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
